overview.description: JSON-driven multi-agent development framework with intelligent CLI orchestration (Gemini/Qwen/Codex/Claude), context-first architecture, and automated workflow execution

key_components.name: CCW CLI Core
key_components.description: Main CLI application with command routing, tool registry, and workflow orchestration

key_components.name: CodexLens
key_components.description: Multi-modal code analysis platform with semantic search, LSP integration, and hybrid retrieval

key_components.name: CCW Dashboard Frontend
key_components.description: React-based visual dashboard for session management, search, and workflow monitoring

key_components.name: LiteLLM Integration
key_components.description: Unified LLM interface layer for multi-provider support (Gemini, Codex, Qwen, Claude)

key_components.name: Workflow Skills
key_components.description: Modular skill definitions for workflow automation (planning, review, analysis, generation)

key_components.name: MCP Server
key_components.description: Model Context Protocol server for tool discovery and execution

key_components.name: CLI Commands
key_components.description: Core CLI commands: workflow, session, tool, memory, view, serve

key_components.name: Tool Registry
key_components.description: MCP-like tool system with schema validation and execution for file operations, search, CLI execution

key_components.name: Core Routes
key_components.description: HTTP API routes for CCW, CodexLens, LiteLLM, memory, and session management

key_components.name: Learn System
key_components.description: Profile-aware learning workflow with phase-based progression and assessment
